refusal_codes.action: register this installation before requesting hosted install advice
refusal_codes.fallback: Use local search/list/view commands without hosted recommendations.
refusal_codes.reason: Hosted catalog recommendations require a registered client before install advice can be trusted.

refusal_codes.action: grant the required team-pack entitlement or select a public item
refusal_codes.fallback: Keep using public MIT and community-core skills.
refusal_codes.reason: The catalog item is limited to an entitled organization or team plan.

refusal_codes.action: approve a policy override or choose an allowed replacement
refusal_codes.fallback: Use the existing allowed local skill set.
refusal_codes.reason: Enterprise policy blocks this item for the current installation.

refusal_codes.action: remove the blocker or publish a replacement item
refusal_codes.fallback: Do not install; keep the current local skill.
refusal_codes.reason: Signed catalog metadata marks this item as blocked for install.

refusal_codes.action: publish a replacement mapping if one exists
refusal_codes.fallback: Pin the installed version or remove it manually after review.
refusal_codes.reason: The installed item is retired and must not receive automated update advice.

refusal_codes.action: improve the item and rerun evaluation before recommending install
refusal_codes.fallback: Preview only; do not install from recommendation output.
refusal_codes.reason: The item score is below the public install threshold.
The requested recommendation channel is not supported by this client.

refusal_codes.action: use an item for the active agent or switch runtimes explicitly
refusal_codes.fallback: Keep the current runtime-specific local skills.
refusal_codes.reason: The item targets a different agent runtime than this installation.

refusal_codes.action: publish signed metadata before this item can be recommended
refusal_codes.fallback: Treat the item as unavailable for hosted install.
refusal_codes.reason: Recommendation metadata is unsigned or cannot be verified.

refusal_codes.action: inspect and manage the local skill directly
refusal_codes.fallback: No hosted recommendation action is available.
refusal_codes.reason: The item is a local MIT skill and has no hosted install or update action.
